actions.body:
<!-- resume-quarantine-app-id: runway__member-of-technical-staff-inference__b8b99e0a70 -->
## Summary

- Role: Member of Technical Staff - Inference
- Tracker status: Quarantined

- Remote profile: remote (88)

Retry queued on 2026-02-19 for CI submit pipeline.
Queue gate demoted on 2026-02-19 (fit=38/70, remote=88/55; reasons=fit_score_below_threshold:38<70,missing_customer_facing_signal,missing_fde_competencies_block,missing_fde_headline,python_requested_not_explicit_in_resume).

Queue gate passed on 2026-03-17 (fit=73/70, remote=88/50, track=general, lane=ci_auto:greenhouse).
CI submit unconfirmed on 2026-03-17 via greenhouse. Reason=confirmation_text_not_detected. Will retry next run.
Queue gate demoted on 2026-03-17 (fit=73/80, remote=88/50; reasons=fit_score_below_threshold:73<80,python_requested_not_explicit_in_resume).
CI submit blocked on 2026-03-17 via greenhouse. Reason=confirmation_text_not_detected. Needs manual completion.
